meta.title: Sign in | Padel2Go
meta.description: Sign in to your Padel2Go account or create a new one.

forgot.title: Forgot password?
forgot.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.

reset.title: Set new password
reset.description: Enter a new password for your account.
reset.successDescription: Your password has been changed. You're now signed in.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

toasts.alreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Please sign in instead.
toasts.accountCreated: Your account has been created. You're now signed in.
toasts.resetLinkInfo: If an account exists, you'll receive a link to reset your password.
